final:
module binary_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] count);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 8'b00000000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end
endmodule
